user_query: My friend is interested in working at Ubisoft. Can you search for job openings at Ubisoft and provide a list of available positions? Also, find the company details for Ubisoft, including their description, sectors, and average rating.

TaskList.description: Search for job openings at Ubisoft and retrieve a list of available positions.
Find company details for Ubisoft, including their description, sectors, and average rating.
